description_long: This cabin features a large, gently sloped hip roof with deep overhangs, constructed from dark shingles or tiles. The structure is elevated on short stilts or piers, with a wide wraparound deck or veranda on at least two sides, bordered by a simple wooden railing. The exterior walls are clad in wood paneling, giving the building a warm, rustic appearance, and the base is finished with a lighter material, possibly concrete or stone. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically distributed along the longer facades, providing ample natural light. There are two visible exterior doors: one accessed by a staircase at the front and another at the rear, both leading directly onto the deck. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and practical elements, suitable for residential or communal use in an urban or park setting.
description: A large, elevated wooden cabin with a dark hip roof, wraparound deck, and symmetrical windows. The structure features front and rear staircases and a rustic, inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase leading up to the deck, the prominent hip roof, and the front door centered beneath the overhang.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of symmetrically spaced windows, the full-length deck with railing, and the side staircase.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the secondary entrance with double doors, the continuation of the deck, and the supporting piers beneath the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the uninterrupted deck, railing, and the absence of a staircase or door on this facade.
attribute_roof_type: hip roof with deep overhangs, constructed from dark shingles or tiles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple medium-sized rectangular windows symmetrically distributed along the longer facades, evenly spaced in a linear pattern
attribute_door_placement: One main door centered on the front facade accessed by a staircase, and a set of double doors at the rear opening onto the deck

license_info.creator_display_name: พระมหาเจดีย์ศรีแสงธรรมวิสุทธิมงคล
